name: Beef Zucchini Casserole
recipeIngredient: 4 cups thinly sliced zucchini, about 3 medium
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté zucchini and onion in butter until the onion is tender.
2. Pour the mixture into a 10x6x1 1/2" baking dish; sprinkle with 1/4 cup Parmesan cheese. Set aside.
3. In the same skillet, brown the ground beef and drain excess fat.
4. Stir flour, salt, pepper, and ketchup into the meat.
5. Spoon the meat mixture evenly over the zucchini.
6. Cover; bake in a 350°F oven for 20 minutes.
7. Remove the cover; top with an additional 1/4 cup Parmesan cheese.
8. Bake, uncovered, for another 5 minutes or until the cheese is lightly browned.
9. Cut into squares to serve. Makes 6 servings.
